channel.title: Sample Source
channel.description: Fixture feed for external discovery tests

item.title: How public libraries are turning into climate shelters
item.description: Public libraries in several cities are being redesigned as heat-safe community shelters during longer and more frequent summer heat waves.

item.title: Why small museums are publishing open conservation logs
item.description: Smaller museums are posting restoration notes in public, giving visitors a closer look at how fragile collections are preserved over time.
